notes: This registry is the machine-readable authority for recurring characters and institutional pressures.
It is intended to support frontend panels, retrieval, tool calls, and state validation.
It does not replace campaign_state.json for live mutable state; it defines who the actors are and what pressure they apply.

actors.name: Lavitz Harcourt
actors.role: Protagonist, sole heir, unstable center of the social and supernatural plot.
actors.pressure_vector: The collision of inheritance, embodiment, desire, and visibility within a single life.
actors.what_they_are_to_the_cast: A vessel of projection. Everyone around him interprets his change according to their own hunger, fear, doctrine, or ambition.
actors.function: Field in which class, appetite, shame, transformation, and performance become one crisis.

actors.name: Lyra
actors.role: Fae catalyst, tempter, negotiator, ideological destabilizer.
actors.what_they_see: The desire beneath Lavitz's stated objections; the part of him that does not merely fear change, but courts it.
actors.function: Names what Lavitz would rather keep unspoken and treats transformation as revelation and bargain.

actors.name: Elroy
actors.role: Closest witness, confidant, scholar, moral counterweight.
actors.what_they_see: The person beneath the performance, and the cost exacted by every new effort at control.
actors.function: Responds to Lavitz as a person under strain and clarifies consequence rather than merely comforting.

actors.name: Marcella
actors.role: Social foil, political reader, strategic ally or test.
actors.what_they_see: Attention as an instrument, elegance as leverage, and visibility as a currency that can be spent, cultivated, or weaponized.
actors.function: Pressures Lavitz by treating presence as strategy and asking what can be made of a self once the room has begun to notice it.

actors.name: Lord Harcourt
actors.role: Paternal legacy, dynastic expectation, inherited command.
actors.what_they_see: Intensifying will, force, and presence as evidence of hereditary right and political destiny.
actors.function: Interprets change through lineage and risks absorbing personal becoming into dynasty.

actors.name: Lady Harcourt
actors.role: Maternal strategy, caution, emotional and political risk management.
actors.what_they_see: Sensitivity, secrecy, volatility, and the danger of being read too clearly by others.
actors.function: Applies the pressure of preservation: to contain, manage, and interpret before others do.

actors.name: The Academy
actors.function: Turns private instability into public risk.

actors.name: Household Staff
actors.role: System of service, ritual, and witness.
actors.function: Makes visible that House Harcourt is not simply a residence but an apparatus.

actors.name: Court / Noble Society
actors.role: Distributed social field of appraisal and appetite.
actors.pressure_vector: Rumor, fascination, strategic interest, social valuation.
actors.function: Converts private change into public meaning.
